title: Polling completed across Erode constituencies
summary: District completed voting across all constituencies with strong turnout. Officials confirmed smooth conduct with minor delays in a few booths.

title: Election monitoring teams continue cash surveillance
summary: Authorities continued checks on suspicious cash movement post polling. Several verification cases remain under review by election officials.

title: Security remains tight after polling
summary: Paramilitary and state police continue deployment at strong rooms storing EVMs. 24-hour surveillance ensured until counting day.

title: EVMs secured in strong rooms with CCTV monitoring
summary: All voting machines sealed and transported safely under GPS tracking. CCTV monitoring and multi-layer security arrangements are in place.

title: Traffic restrictions eased after polling day
summary: Temporary restrictions on highways and ghat sections were lifted after completion of election material transport.

title: Liquor ban lifted after polling period
summary: TASMAC shops and licensed bars resumed operations after end of election-related dry days.

title: Markets reopen with moderate activity
summary: Local markets, including jewellery and textile sectors, resumed operations with gradual return of traders.

title: Police increase patrols post election
summary: Additional patrols deployed across key areas to prevent post-poll disturbances and ensure public safety.

title: Agri markets resume trading after poll break
summary: Regulated markets reopened with steady arrivals of coconuts, copra, and castor following polling day pause.

title: Gold prices show slight recovery
summary: Gold prices in Erode markets edged up slightly after recent dip, reflecting broader market fluctuations.

title: Silver prices remain stable
summary: Silver prices showed minimal change with steady trading observed across local markets.

title: Turmeric prices steady in mandi
summary: Turmeric prices remained within recent range with moderate demand reported in local markets.

title: Hot weather continues across Erode
summary: Day temperatures remain high with clear skies and no rainfall expected. Heat conditions persist.

title: Schools reopen after election holiday
summary: Educational institutions resumed normal functioning after closure during polling day.

title: Hospitals report normal operations
summary: Healthcare facilities continue routine services with no emergency alerts reported.
